Registry / Terms / conformity assessment of a measuring instrument

conformity assessment of a measuring instrument

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00191 · 3 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.11view ↗

testing and evaluation of measuring instruments to ascertain whether or not a single instrument, an instrument lot or a production series of instruments comply with all statutory requirements applicable to this instrument type

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.11
    testing and evaluation of measuring instruments to ascertain whether or not a single instrument, an instrument lot or a production series of instruments comply with all statutory requirements applicable to this instrument type

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIML 2022. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 2 partially diverge.
